evaluators.name: Quick Reclaimed Wall Art Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Quick Reclaimed Wall Art' project collection containing exactly 2 top-rated reclaimed wood wall art projects under 3 hours.

evaluators.name: Top Beginner Wood Burning Tutorial Comment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user commented with the specified text on a top-rated beginner wood burning tutorial from the last 3 months.

evaluators.name: Beginner Tools Chisel Thread Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created the correct chisel-set thread in the main Beginner Tools subforum with required title, tags, and body sentence.

evaluators.name: Gift Ideas Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Gift Ideas' wishlist with exactly 3 wall art products under $60 each and total price at most $150.

evaluators.name: Beginner Practice Plan Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Beginner Practice Plan' reading list containing exactly 2 qualifying Carving posts and 2 qualifying Joinery posts, all beginner-level and 20 minutes or less.

evaluators.name: Top Geometric Artists Follow Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user followed the top 2 geometric-style artists (with at least 2 completed projects) and enabled notifications for their new projects.

evaluators.name: Floating Shelf Build List Materials Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a 'Floating Shelf Build List' materials list from the floating shelf project and added all of that project's materials.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Beginner Carving Workshop Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the cheapest qualifying online beginner wood carving workshop next month using a non-external pay-later style payment option.
